ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., HXL) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "sector" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the company belongs to */,
  "industry" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the company belongs to */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's official website */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "adjusted" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the stock */,
  "after_hours_price" REAL /* After-hours price of the stock */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Technology, Healthcare) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Total market capitalization of all companies in the sector */,
  "average_pe_ratio" REAL /* Average P/E ratio of companies in the sector */,
  "average_pb_ratio" REAL /* Average P/B ratio of companies in the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry (e.g., Software, Pharmaceuticals) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Total market capitalization of all companies in the industry */,
  "average_pe_ratio" REAL /* Average P/E ratio of companies in the industry */,
  "average_pb_ratio" REAL /* Average P/B ratio of companies in the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the analysis */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., statistical, visual) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (in progress, completed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis the visualization belongs to */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data used to create the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_data" TEXT /* Data used to create the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dashboard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dashboard was last updated */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs with whom the dashboard is shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard the widget belongs to */,
  "widget_type" TEXT /* Type of widget (e.g., chart, graph) */,
  "widget_data" TEXT /* Data used to create the widget */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the widget was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the widget was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_widgets_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data used to generate the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs with whom the report is shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
